steps.title: Find the intersection
steps.content: A solution to a system of equations is an ordered pair that satisfies both equations. Substitute the choices into $y=\frac{16}{x}$ and $y=16x$.

steps.title: Check the matching point
steps.content: For choice C, $(1,16)$: $\frac{16}{1}=16$ and $16(1)=16$. The same $y$-value works for both equations, so $(1,16)$ is the intersection point. The other choices either use $x=0$, which is not allowed in $\frac{16}{x}$, or do not satisfy both equations. Choice C is correct.
